amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 7 — paragraph 2 b (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 7 — paragraph 2 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2 b. The AI Office, national supervisory authorities or the European Parliament may request the Commission to reassess and recategorise the risk categorisation of an AI systemin accordance with paragraphs 1 and 1a. The Commission shall give reasons for its decision and make them public.
parliament_text: 2 b. The AI Office, national supervisory authorities or the European Parliament may request the Commission to reassess and recategorise the risk categorisation of an AI systemin accordance with paragraphs 1 and 1a. The Commission shall give reasons for its decision and make them public.
